title: Copilot Compose Configuration
description: Schema for .github/copilot-compose.yaml — defines which copilot instruction modules to compose into a target repo's .github/copilot-instructions.md file.

source.description: The master repository containing instruction modules and presets.

repo.description: GitHub repository in owner/repo format that hosts the instruction modules.

ref.description: Git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to fetch modules from. Defaults to 'main'.

modules.description: List of module IDs to include. Each ID corresponds to a module file in the master repo's modules/ directory. Either 'modules' or 'preset' must be specified.

items.description: A module ID matching the 'id' field in a module's YAML frontmatter.

preset.description: Name of a preset from the master repo's presets/ directory. A preset defines a curated set of modules. Either 'modules' or 'preset' must be specified.

path-instructions.description: Map modules to specific file paths using glob patterns. These become path-scoped instructions that Copilot applies only when working with matching files.

id.description: The module ID to scope to specific paths.

applyTo.description: Glob pattern defining which files this module's instructions apply to.

overrides.description: Per-module overrides to customize module content for this repo. Keys are module IDs.

^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$.description: Override configuration for a specific module.

append.description: Content to append after the module's instructions.
examples: - Also use Zod for all runtime validation schemas.

prepend.description: Content to prepend before the module's instructions.
examples: **Note:** This project uses strict null checks.

sync.description: Controls how modules are composed into the output file.

strategy.description: Composition strategy. 'merge' combines modules into a single file with separators. 'replace' overwrites the output file entirely on each sync.

header.description: Whether to include a 'DO NOT EDIT' HTML comment header at the top of the composed file.

separator.description: Markdown separator inserted between module sections in the composed output.
